## Docker Images

- **GitHub Container Registry**: `ghcr.io/pazter1101/patchnotes:{{version}}`
- **Docker Hub**: `pazter1101/patchnotes:{{version}}`

### Usage
```bash
docker run --rm \
  -e LLM_API_KEY=your-api-key \
  -v ./config.yml:/config.yml \
  -v ./prompts:/prompts \
  -v ./output:/output \
  ghcr.io/pazter1101/patchnotes:{{version}}
```
